text:
Created attachment 173736
call setlocale()

setenv LC_ALL de_DE.ISO8859-1

with patch
% /usr/obj/usr/src/bin/cp/cp notpresent1 notpreset2
cp: notpresent1: Datei oder Verzeichnis nicht gefunden

without patch
% cp notpresent1 notpreset2
cp: notpresent1: No such file or directory
